text: Hi Vijay R, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?

content: CONTEXT SUMMARY: User engaged in a conversation of 14 turns but AI parsing was inconclusive. Assumed interested.

text: Yes, it's a good time to talk but what is it?
It looks like we're about to get started! The XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter) can help you save energy and increase your battery life.
I want to know the price.

You know, our XOptimus Smart Charger is usually priced at around 500 INR for a standard model, but I can check if we have any promotions available or if it's on sale right now. Would you like me to look into that for you?
You're ready to get started with your XOptimus Smart Charger. What's the next step? Do you need help choosing a wall adapter or do you have any questions about it?
No, no, it's not like that. I will just check in and call later.
Hey, sounds good! We'll catch up soon.
Okay. Then hang up the call.
Thanks for holding, I'm going to go check on that now.
